expectations.evidence: Fetched finstat.sk for all 3 ICOs via Playwright browser
Checked FS, SP, VSZP debtors, tax reliability, RUZ entities
No formal zlte stopy evaluation with named rules. Used ad-hoc risk levels (KRITICKE/VYSOKE/STREDNE) but didn't systematically evaluate the 7 defined flag types
Custom format with numbered sections, no Sumar header, no zlte stopy table per supplier, no standardized template
WAY INDUSTRIES flagged: 145M is 11x annual revenue, negative equity -1.35M, triple debtor 500K+
